framework.name: A2A/MCP Communication Gap: Missing Security Layer
framework.description: Google's Agent2Agent (A2A) and Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) provide communication fabric and data access but lack robust, interoperable security layer for policy enforcement. This creates potential for 'free-for-all of unchecked actions' as agents orchestrate workflows and handle sensitive data.
framework.raw_quote: Existing protocols like Google's Agent2Agent (A2A) and Anthropic's Model Context Protocol (MCP) provide the communication fabric, yet a gap remains: a robust, interoperable security layer for policy enforcement.
